blockingIssues.description: compute_by_category() always uses 'unknown' as category key because TaskResult doesn't contain category info. The by_category HashMap will have one entry with key 'unknown' containing all results, not broken down by actual category.
compute_by_difficulty() always uses 'unknown' as difficulty key because TaskResult doesn't contain difficulty info. Same issue as compute_by_category - the by_difficulty HashMap will be mislabeled.

filtered_tasks() checks task_filter and category_filter but never checks difficulty_filter. RunnerConfig defines difficulty_filter but it's never used, so users cannot filter tasks by difficulty level.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add per-crate test commands to services.yaml for more efficient crate-specific testing. Current commands (test, typecheck, lint) run against entire workspace. Workers may need 'cargo test -p <crate>', 'cargo clippy -p <crate>' variants for faster iteration during development.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature benchmark-suite used 'cargo test -p swell-benchmark', 'cargo clippy -p swell-benchmark' commands which are not in services.yaml.

rejectedObservations.reason: Ambiguous - skill system may intentionally not have all skill files. The worker proceeded without it successfully.
